fr:mainmatter.fr:p: We may choose a generic object for {\mathopen {}\left [C\right ]\mathclose {}}, namely the identity element (C_{0},1_{C_{0}})\in \widetilde {{\mathopen {}\left [C\right ]\mathclose {}}}. Given any object (x,u)\in \widetilde {{\mathopen {}\left [C\right ]\mathclose {}}} the cartesian map (x,u)\to (C_{0},1_{C_{0}}) is given as follows:

We may choose a generic object for {\mathopen {}\left [C\right ]\mathclose {}}, namely the identity element (C_{0},1_{C_{0}})\in \widetilde {{\mathopen {}\left [C\right ]\mathclose {}}}. Given any object (x,u)\in \widetilde {{\mathopen {}\left [C\right ]\mathclose {}}} the cartesian map (x,u)\to (C_{0},1_{C_{0}}) is given as follows:
